phrases.intent_en: Ask which section specializes in antique furniture
phrases.text_local: Quel marché est spécialisé dans les meubles anciens ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel mar-SHAY eh spay-syah-lee-ZAY dahn lay MUH-bluh ahn-SYEHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Puces de Saint-Ouen is actually a collection of 15 distinct markets. Marché Serpette specializes in 20th-century furniture and design, Marché Paul Bert has a wide mix of furniture and decorative items, and Marché Biron focuses on fine art and high-end antiques. Open Saturday, Sunday, and Monday.

phrases.intent_en: Negotiate a lower price on an item
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous pouvez faire un geste sur le prix ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kuh voo poo-VAY fehr uhn zhest soor luh PREE
phrases.cultural_note: Haggling (marchander) is expected and part of the culture at the Puces. 'Faire un geste' (literally 'make a gesture') is the polite way to ask for a discount. Offering 20-30% below the asking price is common. Cash often gets a better deal than card.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the dealer can arrange shipping abroad
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo or-gah-nee-ZAY lex-pay-dee-SYOHN ah lay-trahn-ZHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Many established dealers at the Puces work with professional shippers and can arrange international delivery for larger furniture pieces. For antiques over 100 years old, a certificate of authenticity ('certificat d'authenticité') may be required for customs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Marché Vernaison is for vintage items
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le marché Vernaison pour les objets vintage ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh mar-SHAY vehr-neh-ZOHN poor layz ohb-ZHEH veen-TEZH
phrases.cultural_note: Marché Vernaison is the oldest market within the Puces (since 1920) and is a labyrinth of 300 small stalls selling vintage clothing, old toys, jewelry, porcelain, and curiosities. It's the most romantic and atmospheric section for browsing.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a price certificate for customs purposes
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me fournir un certificat d'authenticité pour la douane ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo muh foor-NEER uhn sehr-tee-fee-KAH doh-tahn-tee-see-TAY poor lah DWAHN
phrases.cultural_note: For antiques (items over 100 years old), customs officers may require documentation when taking them across borders. Reputable dealers provide provenance certificates. Items exported from the EU may also be subject to cultural heritage export controls if of exceptional significance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a restaurant recommendation inside the market
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un bon restaurant dans le marché pour déjeuner ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn bohn reh-stoh-RAHN dahn luh mar-SHAY poor day-ZHUH-nay
phrases.cultural_note: Ma Cocotte (designed by Philippe Starck) and Le Paul Bert are popular restaurants within the Puces. The market neighborhood of Saint-Ouen also has excellent North African and French bistro options. Lunch here is part of the full Puces experience for Parisians.
